nasb.text: and the corpse of Jezebel will be as dung on the face of the field in the property of Jezreel, so they cannot say, “This is Jezebel.” ’ ”

esv.text: and the corpse of Jezebel shall be as dung on the face of the field in the territory of Jezreel, so that no one can say, This is Jezebel.’”

cnv.text: 耶洗別的屍體要像耶斯列田間的糞肥，以致人不能說：‘這是耶洗別。’”

ccb.text: 耶洗别的尸体必像耶斯列田间的粪便，无人能认出那是耶洗别。’”
